title: PRODUCT DESIGNER + SYSTEM DEVELOPER
bio: I build digital spaces that bridge high-fidelity spatial design and AI agent technology. I view user interfaces as physical cognitive extensions, where responsive layouts, deliberate negative space, and custom micro-interactions combine to make complex technologies accessible.

philosophy.heading: My Philosophy
philosophy.body: The best interfaces feel invisible. By leveraging consistent grids, responsive proportions, and organic tactile animations, I design cognitive workspaces that adapt to user focus and action.

aiThinking.heading: AI Hybrid Thinking
aiThinking.body: AI is not just a feature; it is a collaborative partner. I focus on generative UI systems that build tailored, responsive web interfaces dynamically in response to natural language goals.

experience.description: Architecting semantic interfaces that adapt dynamically based on LLM orchestration layers.
Designed and prototyped multi-screen dashboard cockpits and augmented-reality heads-up displays (AR HUD) for electric vehicles.
Created highly accessible, animation-rich desktop design systems and micro-interaction foundations.
